uplink.description: Meter-data uplink (MIB GetResponse 0x58) -> power + energy + voltage + current
uplink._note: Synthetic SLS MIB meter-data frame (0x58 GetResponse); expected.data via the ported upstream decoder (oracle). power -> power.active (W), energy (kWh) -> metering.energy.total (Wh), VRMS -> power.voltage (V), IRMS -> power.current (A); dimmer/powerfactor as extras. No upstream examples published. Satisfies power-meter.
